subject: Can't log into my account after password reset
body: Hi, I reset my password yesterday but now I can't log in at all. It just says 'invalid credentials' even though I'm using the new password. I've tried 3 times already. This is really frustrating because I need to access an invoice for my accountant today.

subject: Billing charged me twice this month
body: I just checked my bank statement and I see two charges of $49.99 from your company on the same day, June 15th. I only have one subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

subject: Feature request: dark mode for mobile app
body: Love the product! Would it be possible to add a dark mode option to the mobile app? My eyes would really appreciate it for late night use. Not urgent, just a suggestion.

subject: URGENT - data export feature completely broken, losing client trust
body: This is the third time this month the export to CSV feature has failed silently. I'm a paying enterprise customer and I have a board meeting in 2 hours where I need this data. If this isn't fixed immediately I will need to escalate to my account manager and consider canceling our contract.

subject: How do I change my email address on file?
body: Simple question - where in settings can I update the email address associated with my account? Couldn't find it in the help docs.

subject: Considering legal action regarding unauthorized renewal
body: I cancelled my subscription in writing via email three months ago and you have continued to charge me. I have the cancellation email as proof. I want every charge since then refunded or I will be contacting my lawyer and filing a complaint with the consumer protection agency.

subject: App keeps crashing on Android after latest update
body: Since updating to version 4.2.1 the app crashes every time I try to open the reports section. I've tried reinstalling but it still happens. Using a Samsung Galaxy S23, Android 14.

subject: Thank you for the great support last week!
body: Just wanted to say the support agent who helped me last week (ticket TCK-0892) was fantastic and solved my issue super fast. Really appreciate the great service!

subject: Need API rate limit increased for integration
body: We're hitting the 100 requests/minute rate limit on our enterprise plan integration. Can we discuss increasing this? Our use case requires syncing roughly 500 records per minute during peak hours.

subject: Forgot my account email, can't reset password
body: I don't remember which email I used to sign up years ago and the password reset isn't working since I can't enter the right email. Can someone help me recover my account? My name is on the account as J. Mueller if that helps.
